title: ASCO 2026 Preview — Major Cancer Data Starting May 29
headline: ASCO 2026 abstracts dropped May 22 previewing practice-changing data from Lilly, Merck, BioNTech, and Moderna, with Lilly securing two rare plenary session slots for selpercatinib and abemaciclib.
key_facts: ASCO annual meeting begins May 29; abstracts published May 22; Lilly has 2 plenary slots: LIBRETTO-432 (selpercatinib adjuvant RET-mutant NSCLC) and SARC041 (abemaciclib liposarcoma); monarchE OS data also expected

title: Regeneron Fianlimab/Libtayo Misses vs. Keytruda in Melanoma
headline: Regeneron's fianlimab plus Libtayo combination failed to significantly outperform Merck's Keytruda in late-stage melanoma, wiping out billions in market value and raising doubts about the LAG-3+PD-1 combination strategy.
key_facts: Fianlimab + cemiplimab did not significantly outperform pembrolizumab; billions in market cap erased; reported May 18, 2026

title: BioMarin Voxzogo Hits Phase 3 in Hypochondroplasia — sNDA Q3 2026
headline: BioMarin's Voxzogo met its primary endpoint in the Phase 3 CANOPY-HCH-3 study in hypochondroplasia children with +2.33 cm/yr annualized growth velocity improvement vs. placebo (p<0.0001), with an sNDA filing planned for Q3 2026.
key_facts: Primary endpoint: AGV +2.33 cm/yr vs. placebo at Week 52 (p<0.0001); standing height p<0.0001; height Z-score p<0.0001; arm span p=0.004; sNDA to FDA planned Q3 2026; announced May 20, 2026

title: Leqembi Iqlik PDUFA Extended 3 Months to August 24
headline: The FDA extended its review of Biogen and Eisai's subcutaneous Leqembi Iqlik sBLA by three months from the original May 24, 2026 PDUFA date to August 24, 2026.
key_facts: Original PDUFA May 24, 2026; extension announced May 8, 2026; new PDUFA August 24, 2026; sBLA has Priority Review; indication: early Alzheimer's disease MCI and mild AD dementia

title: Regenxbio RGX-202 Meets Phase 3 Primary Endpoint in Duchenne
headline: Regenxbio's gene therapy RGX-202 met its primary endpoint in the pivotal AFFINITY DUCHENNE Phase 3 trial with 93% of patients achieving meaningful microdystrophin expression, positioning the company for potential accelerated approval in 2027.
key_facts: Primary endpoint met (p<0.0001); 93% of patients (n=30) achieved microdystrophin expression >10% at Week 12; functional correlation on NSAA (n=9); accelerated approval targeted 2027; announced May 14, 2026

title: AZ/Daiichi Sankyo Datroway Approved in First-Line TNBC
headline: AstraZeneca and Daiichi Sankyo's Datroway received FDA approval in first-line triple-negative breast cancer on May 22, 2026.

title: Lilly Triple-G Obesity Drug Hits Goal in Phase 3
headline: Eli Lilly's triple-acting GLP-1/GIP/glucagon obesity drug met its primary endpoint in a Phase 3 trial, adding to the company's growing weight-loss portfolio.
key_facts: Triple-G agonist (GLP-1/GIP/glucagon); Phase 3 primary endpoint met

title: Lilly Acquires Engage Therapeutics for Non-Viral Genetic Medicines
headline: Eli Lilly acquired Engage Therapeutics to advance non-viral genetic medicine capabilities, expanding its pipeline beyond small molecules and biologics.
key_facts: Acquisition of Engage Therapeutics; focus on non-viral genetic medicines; deal value not disclosed

title: Immunovant Shares Surge on Compelling Arthritis Trial Data
headline: Immunovant shares surged after analysts called Phase data in tough-to-treat arthritis 'compelling' with blockbuster potential, per STAT News reporting on May 21, 2026.
key_facts: Reported May 21, 2026; analyst characterized results as 'compelling' with 'blockbuster' potential; indication: tough-to-treat arthritis

title: EU CHMP Recommends AstraZeneca Etcamah and Novo Oral Wegovy
headline: The EU CHMP recommended approval of AstraZeneca's Etcamah and Novo Nordisk's oral Wegovy formulation on May 22, 2026.
key_facts: CHMP recommendations issued May 22, 2026; AstraZeneca's Etcamah; Novo Nordisk oral Wegovy

title: AbbVie Cuts 85 Jobs at Allergan Aesthetics Unit in Irvine, CA
headline: AbbVie filed a WARN notice for 85 layoffs at its Allergan aesthetics unit in Irvine, California, effective July 20, 2026, as post-acquisition integration continues.
key_facts: 85 employees laid off; Irvine, CA Allergan unit; effective July 20, 2026; reported May 22, 2026; AbbVie total WARN-tracked layoffs 595 workers across 11 notices May 2012–Jan 2026

title: Novartis Cuts 76 Jobs at East Hanover NJ Headquarters
headline: Novartis filed a WARN notice for 76 layoffs at its East Hanover, New Jersey headquarters, continuing a broader pattern of US headcount reduction, reported May 22, 2026.
key_facts: 76 employees; East Hanover, NJ headquarters; reported May 22, 2026

title: Bristol Myers Squibb Signs AI Collaboration Deal with Anthropic
headline: Bristol Myers Squibb deepened its AI investment by announcing a collaboration with Anthropic, applying large language model capabilities to drug discovery and development.
key_facts: Collaboration with Anthropic (not acquisition); AI investment in drug discovery

title: Biogen/Denali Parkinson's Drug Falls Short in Trial
headline: A Parkinson's disease drug developed by Biogen and Denali Therapeutics came up short in a clinical study, per BioPharma Dive reporting.
key_facts: Parkinson's indication; trial failed to meet goals; reported week of May 18–24, 2026

title: FDA Places Clinical Hold on Aardvark ARD-101 for Prader-Willi
headline: The FDA placed a full clinical hold on Aardvark Therapeutics' ARD-101 for Prader-Willi syndrome on May 14, 2026, citing cardiovascular safety concerns.
key_facts: Full clinical hold; ARD-101; Prader-Willi syndrome indication; cardiovascular safety concern; announced May 14, 2026

title: Radiopharm Sector Raises $160M: Full-Life and Accro Bioscience
headline: Full-Life Technologies and Accro Bioscience raised a combined $160 million in financings on May 19, 2026, signaling continued investor appetite for radiopharmaceutical companies.
key_facts: $160 million combined raised; Full-Life Technologies and Accro Bioscience; May 19, 2026

title: Upcoming PDUFAs: MannKind Afrezza May 29, Cingulate CTx-1301 May 31
headline: Two upcoming PDUFA dates are on the calendar: MannKind's Afrezza on May 29, 2026, and Cingulate's CTx-1301 on May 31, 2026.
key_facts: MannKind/Afrezza PDUFA May 29, 2026; Cingulate CTx-1301 PDUFA May 31, 2026

title: Bristol Myers Exploring Tau-Targeting Alzheimer's Programs
headline: Bristol Myers Squibb highlighted interest in tau-targeting approaches for Alzheimer's disease, seeing 'big promise beyond amyloid' in its neuroscience pipeline.
key_facts: Tau-targeting program; Alzheimer's disease; beyond amyloid strategy
